name: Spicy Sesame Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente.
2. Drain and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
4. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant.
5. Stir in chopped chili flakes for spicy flavor.
6. Toss cooked noodles into the pan with garlic and chili flakes.
7. Cook for 1-2 minutes to combine flavors.
8. Remove from heat and toss with sesame seeds.
9. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
